goal: Create the production-grade callback page; wire all redirectTo targets; preserve deep links in ProtectedRoute; update handoff doc; verify build.
summary:
Phase 1 — Auth Callback Flow complete.
1. AuthCallback.tsx created with PKCE exchange, getSession fallback, onAuthStateChange timeout, loading/error UI, sessionStorage redirectTo, and URL cleanup.
2. ProtectedRoute.tsx saves current path before redirect.
3. Auth.tsx redirectTo updated to /auth/callback.
4. auth.ts OAuth functions pass redirectTo.
5. App.tsx wired /auth/callback route outside guards.
6. SUPABASE_STEPS.md updated with callback URL checklist.
7. Build verified successfully.
stepSummaries:
1. Create src/pages/AuthCallback.tsx: read ?code from URL, call exchangeCodeForSession if present; fallback to getSession for legacy hash tokens; show loading spinner; on success read redirectTo from sessionStorage and navigate there (or / fallback); on error show a retry link to /auth; strip query/hash from URL via history.replaceState. [verified]
  2. Modify src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx: before redirecting to /auth, save location.pathname + location.search to sessionStorage under redirectTo key. [verified]
  3. Modify src/pages/Auth.tsx to change redirectTo prop from window.location.origin to window.location.origin + '/auth/callback'. [verified]
  4. Modify src/lib/auth.ts: pass redirectTo: window.location.origin + '/auth/callback' in signInWithGoogle and signInWithGitHub options. [verified]
  5. Modify src/App.tsx: add /auth/callback route outside ProtectedRoute, import AuthCallback page. [verified]
  6. Update SUPABASE_STEPS.md Post-Setup Checklist and Auth section to include /auth/callback in the allowed redirect URLs and email template redirect configuration. [verified]
  7. Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript or build errors after all changes. [verified]

ProtectedRoute saves the original path. OAuth and auth-ui redirect to callback. Handoff doc updated. Build passes.
